title: Asphalt Mod
description: Adds asphalt block and the ability to paint them!
body:
## About

This mod adds asphalt blocks, and the ability to paint them in various different colours!

## New Items & Blocks

Includes 15 variants of paint brushes that allow you to paint stripes on asphalt block!\
Paint Scraper to remove the paint stripes!\
3 variants of asphalt block!

## How to craft the new Items & Block

To craft Asphalt you'll need three sand, three gravel, three cobblestone.\
You can craft Asphalt variants in the stonecutter.\
To craft the Paint Brushes, you'll need one stick, one feather, and any dye!\
To craft the Paint Scraper, you'll need to get one stick and 1 copper ingot
